ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., underbust, chest, waist, hip) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_ranges" (
  "size_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size range */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the size range */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the size range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size range was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size range was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_ranges_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for unique product identification */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the specified size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales associate, inventory manager, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
